ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the property */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the property */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the property */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the property was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "floorplans" (
  "floorplan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each floor plan */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property where the floor plan is available */,
  "floorplan_name" TEXT /* Name of the floor plan */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the floor plan */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the floor plan */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Square footage of the floor plan */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the floor plan */,
  "availability_date" TEXT /* Date when the floor plan becomes available */,
  "video_tour_url" TEXT /* URL to the video tour of the floor plan */,
  "additional_action" TEXT /* Additional actions available for the floor plan (e.g., See Floorplan) */,
  "floorplan_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the floor plan image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the floor plan was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the floor plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("floorplan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_floorplans_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property where the unit is located */,
  "floorplan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the floor plan of the unit */,
  "unit_number" TEXT /* Number or identifier of the unit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the unit (e.g., available, leased, under maintenance) */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease starts */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease ends */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant currently leasing the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_floorplan_id FOREIGN KEY ("floorplan_id") REFERENCES floorplans ("floorplan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the tenant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tenant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the tenant */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease starts */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease ends */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the tenant is leasing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tenant was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tenant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_agreements" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease agreement */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant leasing the unit */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit being leased */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease starts */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the lease ends */,
  "monthly_rent" TEXT /* Monthly rent for the lease */,
  "lease_document_url" TEXT /* URL to the lease document */,
  "security_deposit" TEXT /* Security deposit for the lease */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease agreement was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease agreement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_agreements_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_agreements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit for which the request is made */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was submitted */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who resolved the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintenance request was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintenance request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the property manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the property manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the property manager */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property managed by the manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the property manager was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the property manager was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_managers_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease agreement associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES lease_agreements ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant who made the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the tenant (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that offers the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the amenity was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the amenity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit that offers the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feature was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_features_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "floorplan_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "floorplan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the floor plan that offers the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feature was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_floorplan_features_floorplan_id FOREIGN KEY ("floorplan_id") REFERENCES floorplans ("floorplan_id")
)
